---
title: "Resources"
listing:
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  sort:
    - "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, author]
  categories: true
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  page-size: 6
  contents:
    - "./*.qmd"
    - "!./index.qmd"
    
toc: false
toc-location: body
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
Explore Research Software Engineering resources, on and off campus. If something is missing, please feel free to 
[contribute](/KB/Guides/How-to-contribute.qmd).
